hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'pending log updates|log sync|chore.*log sync|commit pending log'; then exit 0; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"git commit completed. You MUST now update devlog.txt and CHANGELOG.txt with the details of this commit. Do this immediately without asking for approval."}}'
